How It Works

Zero configuration setup. Let the AI do the heavy lifting.

1. Add Website URL

Point ATA to your staging or production environment.

2. AI Discovers Application

ATA automatically crawls and maps all user flows and API routes.

3. Autonomous Testing

Generates and runs thousands of E2E, integration, and unit tests.

4. Reports & Fixes

Delivers a beautiful dashboard with pinpointed errors and AI-generated code fixes.

Enterprise-Grade Features

Everything you need to ensure your software is bulletproof, powered by state-of-the-art LLMs.

AI Root Cause Analysis

Security Testing

➜ ~ ata scan https://myapp.com

Scanning routes...
